title: FDA clears first AI-powered adaptive psychiatric assessment tool
summary: The FDA granted De Novo authorization to an AI-driven computerized adaptive testing platform for depression screening, marking a regulatory milestone for SaMD in mental health.
eigen_implication: Direct validation of NOOS regulatory pathway. Proves FDA receptivity to AI-driven psychiatric CAT — accelerates NOOS 510(k) strategy.

title: Apple integrates federated differential privacy into Health data sharing
summary: Apple announced federated differential privacy for HealthKit data sharing, allowing researchers to analyze population health trends without accessing individual records.
eigen_implication: Validates ÆLYA's privacy-preserving architecture approach. Apple's adoption normalizes federated learning + DP for health data — creates market pull for ÆLYA.

title: NIST finalizes ML-KEM, ML-DSA, and SLH-DSA as post-quantum standards
summary: NIST officially published FIPS 203, 204, 205 — the first post-quantum cryptographic standards, mandating federal agencies begin migration within 2 years.
eigen_implication: BURHAN must implement ML-KEM for key exchange and ML-DSA for signatures. 2-year federal mandate creates urgency for enterprise crypto migration — BURHAN's audit trail must be quantum-safe.

title: European Health Data Space (EHDS) regulation enters force
summary: The EHDS regulation officially entered into force, mandating interoperable health data infrastructure across all EU member states with primary and secondary use frameworks.
eigen_implication: Creates the regulated data marketplace infrastructure that MYNε is designed to power. EHDS mandates data intermediary roles — MYNε's exact positioning.

title: Google DeepMind achieves 95% accuracy in multi-agent coordination without communication
summary: DeepMind's new MARL algorithm achieved near-perfect coordination in complex multi-agent tasks without explicit communication channels, using learned implicit signaling.
eigen_implication: Breakthrough for RAQIB agent coordination — enables efficient multi-agent orchestration with minimal inter-agent communication overhead.

title: Project mBridge completes first live multi-CBDC cross-border settlement
summary: Project mBridge (BIS + central banks of China, Hong Kong, Thailand, UAE) completed the first real-value cross-border CBDC transaction, settling $22M across 4 jurisdictions.
eigen_implication: Proves technical feasibility of multi-CBDC settlement that MIZAN targets. mBridge architecture directly informs MIZAN cross-border payment rails.

title: First practical fully homomorphic encryption for real-time ML inference
summary: Researchers demonstrated FHE-based ML inference achieving <100ms latency for clinical prediction models, making privacy-preserving real-time health analytics practical.
eigen_implication: Unlocks ÆLYA's most ambitious capability — real-time encrypted inference. Clients can run NOOS predictions on encrypted patient data without ÆLYA ever seeing plaintext.

title: RAG 2.0: Retrieval-augmented generation with verifiable sourcing achieves expert-level accuracy
summary: New RAG architecture with cryptographic source attestation achieved expert-level accuracy on medical and legal knowledge benchmarks while providing verifiable citations.
eigen_implication: Core upgrade path for YrKnown — verified RAG enables trustworthy expert knowledge systems with auditable provenance. Direct integration with BURHAN attestation.

title: Quantum computer breaks 50-qubit barrier for Shor's algorithm on RSA
summary: IBM demonstrated Shor's algorithm factoring a 50-bit RSA key on a 1121-qubit processor, advancing the Q-Day timeline estimate to 2030-2033.
eigen_implication: Accelerates BURHAN post-quantum migration urgency. Q-Day timeline now estimated 2030-2033 — all BURHAN cryptographic primitives must be quantum-safe by 2028.

title: EU AI Act full enforcement begins — high-risk AI systems must comply
summary: The EU AI Act's provisions for high-risk AI systems (including health AI and employment screening) become fully enforceable, requiring conformity assessments and transparency.
eigen_implication: NOOS falls under high-risk health AI category. ÆLYA consent management becomes legally mandatory for all Eigen products operating in EU. Massive market opportunity.
